---
name: Data correction
about: Report an error in an existing dataset
title: "[Correction] "
labels: bug, data
assignees: ''
---

**Dataset**
Which dataset contains the error? (Include path or release tag)

**Location**
Specific feature, record ID, or geographic area affected.

**Description of error**
What is wrong?

**Expected value**
What should the correct data be? Include source reference if possible.

**Source reference**
Government gazette, official notification, or other authoritative reference.
